basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Delhi Technical Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Delhi (AIIMS Delhi)
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Delhi (AIIMS Delhi) has released the official Technical Officer Recruitment Notification 2026. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced under the AIIMS Delhi Technical Officer Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates up to 35 years of age and holding a Post Graduate degree in Life Sciences or related fields can apply through email on or before 21 July 2026. The official notification PDF and application details are available below.

qualification.education_qualification: Post graduate degree in life sciences or in related fields
qualification.details: Post graduate degree in life sciences or in related fields

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for AIIMS Delhi Technical Officer Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 21-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download AIIMS Delhi Technical Officer Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Delhi Technical Officer Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the AIIMS Delhi Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download AIIMS Delhi Technical Officer Job 2026 Notification PDF

How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for AIIMS Delhi Technical Officer Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 21-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Delhi Technical Officer Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the AIIMS Delhi Technical Officer recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your email application for the Technical Officer post at AIIMS Delhi is 21st July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Technical Officer position?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a post-graduate degree in life sciences or in related fields to be eligible for the Technical Officer role.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Technical Officer post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Technical Officer position is 35 years.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Technical Officer post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Technical Officer post will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 40,000.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the AIIMS Delhi Technical Officer job?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. You need to send your complete application along with required documents to the specified email address before the deadline.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Technical Officer role?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve an Interview and Document Verification.

faq.question: Q8. What type of job is this recruitment?
faq.answer: This is a contractual job opportunity at AIIMS Delhi.

faq.question: Q9. What are the important dates for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The most crucial date is the last date to apply, which is 21st July 2026.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section on this page, under the 'Official Notification PDF' link.
